goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary 评估 dry-run

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 canary 评估 dry-run
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-eval.ts 只读 CLI/函数，用来评估 catty_memory_canaries 中 planned canary 在未来已 judge 的 catty_predictions 上是否通过。输出每条 canary 的 pass、fail、insufficient_samples 或 source_missing，并给出 intent-weighted score delta、broad prediction rate、nudge reports、visible helpfulness 四类检查。新增 focused tests 覆盖 pass、broad regression fail、source_missing、insufficient samples 和缺表不建表；src/catty/README.md 增加入口和边界说明。
summary.why: 前序切片已经能从 user-prior candidate 生成 future-only canary plan，并显式写入 catty_memory_canaries 队列。Catty v0 的 memory dogfood 闭环还缺一个安全的评估读面：先判断候选 memory 在未来样本中是否真的提升 intent-weighted score，且没有变宽、nudging 或 visible helpfulness 下降，再谈转正。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary 评估 dry-run

decisions.chose: 只做 canary queue 的只读评估，不更新 canary 状态、不写 catty_memory_audit、不写用户长期 memory、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: v0 需要先把 dogfood 判准变成可审计输出；转正、状态更新和夜间调度应作为后续独立切片，避免把 eval 数据误当成 admitted memory。

decisions.chose: 以 source prediction 的 judgement 作为基线，对 future judged samples 同时检查 intent-weighted uplift、过宽预测率、nudge reports 和 visible helpfulness。
decisions.rationale: 这对应 catty-v0-plan 的五支柱，避免只靠 hit-rate 或 overall 分数推动 Goodhart。
样本不足和源记录缺失不是 guardrail fail；分开输出能让后续 runner/report 准确解释为什么不能转正。

decisions.chose: 把已有 Catty proposed intents 视为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 前序 intents 分别完成真实 trail、judge seam、SQLite store、shadow CLI、judge-record、daily report、memory candidate、canary queue；本轮只在其后补只读 canary eval，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 评估通过时直接把 candidate 转正为用户 memory
rejected.reason: 会跳过明确的 admission/promotion gate，并把 evaluation CLI 变成写 memory 的通道。

rejected.alternative: 在本轮更新 catty_memory_canaries.status 或写 catty_memory_audit
rejected.reason: 当前还没有 runner/promotion 协议；先写状态会制造误导性的完成感和 live DB side effect。

rejected.alternative: 把 canary eval 接入每分钟 heartbeat
rejected.reason: 评估本身只读，但接调度会扩大运行态边界；v0 仍要求不默认高频模型 heartbeat。

acknowledged_constraints.note: memory-canary-eval 只读 Catty canary/prediction 表，不写用户长期 memory。
没有接 launchd heartbeat，也没有新增模型调用路径。
既有 CLAUDE.md dirty 未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录该边界。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun test src/catty/memory-canary-eval.test.ts，4 pass，24 expect。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts，28 pass，163 expect。
验证通过：bun test，33 pass，177 expect。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
CLI smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary-eval.ts --help 输出预期 usage。
live read-only smoke：bun src/catty/memory-canary-eval.ts 返回 0 evaluations，summary 全 0，没有写 live DB。
临时 SQLite 非空 CLI smoke：queued canary + 3 条 future judgement 返回 status=pass、futureJudged=3。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok。
提交 faa88b3 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-eval.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-eval.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty，未 stage、未提交。

architectural_claims: Catty v0 can now evaluate planned memory canaries against future judged samples without promoting memory.
Canary evaluation is a read-only layer over catty_memory_canaries and catty_predictions, separate from memory admission and audit writes.
The pass/fail decision includes anti-drift guardrails, not just intent-weighted score uplift.
Missing source predictions and insufficient future samples are represented as explicit non-promotion states.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary-eval.ts emits dry-run JSON for the live Catty store by default.
--store-db selects the SQLite store to read for catty_memory_canaries and catty_predictions.
Queued canaries with enough future judged samples return pass when uplift and guardrails all satisfy criteria.
Queued canaries return fail when broad prediction rate, nudge reports, visible helpfulness, or score uplift guardrails fail.
Queued canaries return insufficient_samples until requiredFutureJudgements are available, and source_missing when the source prediction is absent or unjudged.
Missing Catty canary/prediction tables return empty evaluation output without creating tables.
security_implications: memory-canary-eval.ts reads only Catty canary/prediction tables and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command performs no model calls and has no --pi path.
The command does not write canary status, catty_memory_audit, user memory, or any live DB schema during empty-state reads.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the command reads existing catty_memory_canaries and catty_predictions when present.
Existing memory-canary queue write/list behavior is unchanged.
